title: ballota hispanica subsp. bullata
intro: Ballota hispanica subsp. bullata, also known as Spanish bugloss, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spanish bugloss include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Spanish bugloss can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
